prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科组最低位次分别为约18名、13名、12名、12名、12名，整体呈前移趋势，2021至2022年大幅前移后近四年稳定在12名左右，2025年基准位次为12名；该校在内蒙古文科组招生计划2021–2025年均为10人，2026年计划仍为10人，计划人数持平，无扩缩招带来的直接竞争变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第2名，属全国顶尖学府，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、食堂宿舍等舆情，但北大作为顶尖学府整体报考热度不受明显影响；抖音热度排名第3（高热），短视频平台曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高涨；北大拥有法学A+、中国语言文学A+、社会学A+、应用经济学A+、工商管理A+等大量A+学科，文科组招生专业基本覆盖上述王牌学科，学科实力对高分考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、经济学等文科热门专业社会热度分化观望，但北大层次加持下仍为顶尖选择；本省2026年考生总数约15.4万，较2025年（约11.6万）大幅增加约32%，其中历史类考生估算从约3.3万增至约4.3万，竞争明显加剧；北京大学位于北京，属全国性顶尖高校，在内蒙古无特殊地域偏好，本地招生占比极小（约0.01–0.02），不受地域因素显著影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次已稳定在12名、2026年招生计划持平、本省历史类考生大幅增加约32%导致竞争加剧，以及北大顶尖声誉与高热关注度，预计2026年文科组最低录取位次将较2025年进一步前移（数字减小），预测最低位次约9名，区间6–12名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group were approximately 18th, 13th, 12th, 12th, and 12th respectively, showing an overall forward trend. After a significant forward shift from 2021 to 2022, it stabilized around 12th in the past four years, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being 12th. The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Inner Mongolia was 10 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the plan for 2026 remains 10 students, with no change in planned numbers and no direct competition changes due to expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranking 2nd in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, making it a top national institution with strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety, cafeteria, and dormitory issues, but as a top university, the overall application enthusiasm is not significantly affected. It ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with massive exposure on short video platforms, maintaining high attention for applications. Peking University has numerous A+ disciplines such as Law A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Sociology A+, Applied Economics A+, and Business Administration A+, and the liberal arts group enrollment majors basically cover these top disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors like Law and Economics have mixed social popularity, but with Peking University's level, they remain top choices. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (about 116,000), with history category candidates estimated to increase from about 33,000 to about 43,000, intensifying competition. Peking University is located in Beijing, a national top university, with no special regional preference in Inner Mongolia, and the local enrollment proportion is very small (about 0.01–0.02), not significantly affected by regional factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical rankings have stabilized at 12th, the enrollment plan for 2026 remains unchanged, the significant increase of about 32% in history category candidates in the province intensifies competition, and Peking University's top reputation and high popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 will further move forward (decrease in number) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 9th, and a range of 6–12th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 6–12, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., 6–8), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 top majors like Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Yuanpei) and Economics Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (10–12), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors to ensure admission probability.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for the science group were approximately 48th, 260th (abnormal gap in 2022), 40th, 54th, and 42nd respectively. Excluding the 2022 anomaly, the rankings fluctuated between 40th and 54th in the past four years, with a baseline ranking of 42nd in 2025. The enrollment plan for the science group in Inner Mongolia was 10 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 12 in 2025, and further increased to 15 in 2026, a 25% expansion compared to 2025, which helps reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 2nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, making it a top national institution with strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety, canteens, and dormitories, but as a top university, the overall application enthusiasm is not significantly affected. Douyin popularity ranks 3rd (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, and application attention continues to rise. Peking University has numerous A+ disciplines such as Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A+, Biology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, and Mechanics A+. The science group enrollment majors basically cover these top disciplines, and the disciplinary strength strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information are highly recommended with high social heat, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is also highly recommended, with application enthusiasm continuing to heat up. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is approximately 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,000). Among them, the number of physics category candidates is estimated to increase from about 84,000 to about 111,000, significantly intensifying competition. Peking University is located in Beijing and is a national top university with no special regional preference in Inner Mongolia. The local enrollment proportion is extremely small (about 0.01–0.02), so it is not significantly affected by regional factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation range of 40–54, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of 25% (alleviating competition), the significant increase of about 32% in the number of physics category candidates in the province (intensifying competition), and the continued high popularity of computer and electronic information majors, the expansion and candidate increase effects partially offset each other. However, the candidate increase is larger and major popularity pushes up application willingness. It is expected that the lowest admission ranking for the science group in 2026 will be slightly lower (larger number) than the 2025 ranking of 42nd, with a predicted lowest ranking of about 51st, and a range of 45–57.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., 45–48), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors such as Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei) and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (54–57), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information and Physics to ensure admission probability.
